kits.kit_name_canonical: Ember Striker of the Scorched Line
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A dexterous front-line combatant who feeds fire into every rapid, close-range exchange, burning through defenses with relentless flat-tempo pressure. Within the Stormbreak Vanguard, this fighter is the ember that does not gust — it simply holds and chars.

A dexterous melee fighter who surges through enemy ranks with relentless, flat-tempo strikes, using physical momentum to anchor the Stormcallers' close-range pressure before the lightning and shadow currents ignite. Where others call the storm, this fighter becomes its leading edge — a body in constant motion that forces formation breaks and opens the field for overlapping discharge.

A lightning-attuned melee fighter who closes distance at relentless tempo, discharging flat-amplitude bursts of electrical force across every target within arm's reach. Her INT-driven strikes carry no ceremony — just the blunt geometry of converging current applied at range zero.

Where the Stormcallers' lightning sweeps wide formations, the Ironbreaker drives straight through them — a high-tempo STR fighter whose relentless physical strikes crack armor and hold the forward line so the storm's discharge finds nowhere to scatter. Rooted at the Pale Keep's threshold, this kit is the kinetic anchor the faction's volatile convergence is built around.

A pure-force brawler who drives STR-loaded blows into the press at melee zero, this fighter holds the warband's front with flat, punishing output that neither surges nor fades. No elemental wrapping — just mass and momentum delivered at the geometry where the Stormbreak line makes contact.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Radiant Striker of the Pale Keep
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A wisdom-driven melee combatant whose holy current surges in unpredictable bursts, this fighter closes ground fast and releases volatile consecrated discharge that layers into the faction's overlapping storm of elemental force. Their east-asian martial discipline shapes the footwork and strike-tempo, but the thunder they carry belongs to the Keep.

A front-line brawler who reads the wind's shifting pressure to time explosive, variable-force sweeps that scatter clustered enemies across the breach. Where others commit to a single strike, this fighter rides the gust's tempo — pulling wide or cutting tight as the moment demands.

A mounted knight who channels lightning through heavy lance strikes, delivering devastating single-target shocks that puncture enemy formations. Their spiky, strength-driven attacks anchor the Stormcallers' close-range assault, converting raw physical force into crackling electrical impact.

A melee-forward warden who anchors the faction's earth-locked formations, delivering sharp, concentrated strikes that interrupt enemy advances and trigger cascading tremor pulses through grounded terrain. Where ranged comrades chain lightning across clusters, this kit holds the foundation—physical force applied with the patience of stone.

A heavy-limbed frontliner who reads the shifting weight of a fight and adjusts each blow's arc and force to match — sometimes a grinding press, sometimes a sudden crashing overhand that clears a pocket of ground. No flourish, no element, just STR-loaded geometry applied at contact range until the line gives.

A wind-channeling brawler who reads the battlefield's pressure shifts before each swing, letting gust and geometry do equal work at arm's reach. Their strikes land with variable force — sometimes a shove, sometimes a scour — calibrated by instinct rather than doctrine.

A close-range earth-shaper who reads fault lines underfoot to time ground-bursts with measured patience, chaining tremors through packed terrain before the enemy can regroup. Where the faction's ranged line holds distance, this warden steps into the gap — pressing WIS-driven variable strikes that ripple outward and pin clustered foes in place.

A dexterous mid-range brawler who reads the terrain like a weapon, the Dustwalker churns earth underfoot to destabilize footing across a wide arc before closing fast with flat, measured strikes. Within the Stormbreak Vanguard's elemental press, this fighter is the ground itself swinging back.

A swift, dexterous fighter who channels water currents through mid-range strikes, threading fluid pressure between the Stormcallers' crackling discharges to sustain relentless tempo across wide formations. Where lightning cleaves and shadow lingers, the Tidewarden's surging current binds the volatile convergence into a continuous, rolling assault.

A Chain Warden who channels smoldering ground-heat through fractured terrain, releasing sudden high-damage fire bursts that arc between clustered targets after long periods of deliberate positioning. Their INT-driven cadence holds the line through patient buildup, letting stone-locked foes absorb the full weight of a spiky, delayed ignition.

A faith-caster who channels holy radiance through wide, measured invocations to fortify the warband's close assault. Where lightning and fire scour the line, this bearer plants sanctified ground—turning the elemental chaos into a crucible where allies press their advantage.

A wind-channeling fighter whose caster-faith discipline harnesses volatile air currents to amplify the faction's close-range discharge patterns, striking wide formations with unpredictable gusts that compound the Keep's thunderous convergence. Where lightning dominates the faction's core, this kit's wind element weaves through the overlapping arcs, destabilizing enemy footing at the threshold of melee.

A mid-range Chain Warden who reads the tremor-lines beneath compacted earth, timing each strike to cascade outward when clustered foes settle into position. Variable in amplitude, this warden's discipline is geological — patient as sediment, decisive as a fault-slip.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Ember Skirmisher of the Scorched Reach
kits.kit_identity_narrative: Where the Vanguard closes to zero range with hammer and gale, this fighter holds the outer edge — loosing rapid fire volleys that seed the field with burning pressure before the warband surges in. Dexterous and relentless, she keeps the flame flat and constant, denying ground so the rest can do their blunt work.

Where the Stormcallers channel lightning in sweeping arcs, this ranged shadow-wielder picks targets from the periphery with precise, high-tempo strikes—a counterpoint to the faction's close-range discharge. The revolver's rapid fire mirrors the voltage-cascade aesthetic of the keep's dominant doctrine while operating in shadow's discrete register.

A patient, dexterity-driven ranged combatant who reads fault lines in the earth before loosing precise strikes that cascade tremors across clustered ground — each hit spiky and deliberate, never wasteful. She holds the Chain Wardens' outer perimeter with stone-locked patience, chaining terrain disruption outward from a single well-placed shot.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Gale Warden of the Cracked Shelf
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient, dexterity-driven ranged fighter who reads wind shear across broken terrain to time devastating burst strikes that arc through clustered enemies — holding the line through stillness and sudden release rather than sustained pressure. True to the Chain Wardens' doctrine, the Gale Warden of the Cracked Shelf uses gusting crosscurrents as a chaining medium, threading shock and scatter across earth-locked kill zones before the enemy can regroup.

A patient long-range specialist who reads fault lines in the earth before releasing concentrated lightning bursts that chain across tightly packed enemies, striking rarely but with punishing amplitude. She holds her position with stone-rooted discipline, letting the terrain do the work until the moment a single discharge cascades through the entire formation.

A caster-arcane keeper who channels fire through deliberate, measured strikes to ignite chain reactions across locked terrain—translating the faction's earth-shock doctrine into incandescent precision. Their spiky INT bursts punctuate the Chain Wardens' patient line-holding, turning singular targets into focal points for cascading damage.

A deliberate ranged warden who holds the line with measured patience, releasing concentrated bursts of seismic force that spike hard into clustered foes before the ground settles again. Her STR-rooted strikes carry the Chain Wardens' earth-dominance doctrine — each shot a tremor that locks terrain and punishes grouping.

A deliberate ranged warden who reads fault lines before releasing concentrated bursts of seismic force, each strike landing infrequently but with enough raw physical weight to buckle grouped enemies and fracture their footing across the contested ground. Patience is the weapon — the Chain Wardens hold the line in stone and silence until the terrain itself does the chaining.

A patient ranged striker who reads the ground before releasing radiant bursts that detonate in sudden, punishing spikes — each pulse calibrated to the tremor lines the Stormfield Chain Wardens have already staked into contested terrain. Wisdom governs the timing; the earth and the light do the rest.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Tremor Sage of the Sunken Ridge
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient earth-reader who holds the line at distance, reading ground resonance before releasing concentrated seismic bursts that chain through clustered formations in sudden, high-amplitude surges. Her WIS-driven timing means strikes land rarely but land hard — each tremor pulse a calculated lock rather than a scatter.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Ember Caller of the Open Road
kits.kit_identity_narrative: She reads the wind before she reads the target, adjusting her cast arc mid-breath as terrain and distance shift beneath her feet. Fire answers her when certainty does not — a ranged intellect that trades fixed ground for variable reach.

This caster harnesses raw fire into sweeping arcs of flame that punish clustered enemies at close range, amplifying the warband's elemental assault through arcane precision. Where the Vanguard strikes with blunt force, the Channeler ignites the air itself—turning the battlefield into a crucible of converging heat.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Indra's Conductor of the Pale Keep
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A south Asian practitioner of arcane channeling who harnesses lightning through ranged incantation, their variable-tempo discharge weaves into the Stormcallers' overlapping formations to amplify the convergence of elemental forces across the battlefield. Their INT-driven casting extends the faction's thunderous reach without abandoning close-range volatility.

A wandering mendicant bound to the Stormcallers' covenant, this keeper channels holy currents through staff-work at medium range, layering faith-cast discharges across shifting formations to amplify the faction's overlapping thunder. Where lightning dominates the outer arc, this keeper's sanctified radiance binds and sustains the convergence.

Where the warband drives force at close range, the Galewright stands at the edge and bends wind into arcing pressure that strikes variable lines across open ground. Guided by read rather than reflex, this fighter measures the current before releasing it — a ranged voice inside a brawler's faction.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Tremor Sage of the Sunken Ridge
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient ranged warden who reads the ground's tension before releasing cascading earth pulses that ripple outward and chain through clustered enemies, letting wisdom dictate the timing of each shock. She holds the line from distance, converting terrain knowledge into variable-amplitude strikes that lock foes in place before the chain collapses inward.
